# Flashthrough

> AI-native service execution. We build products 10x faster with smaller teams, shipping in weeks instead of quarters.

Flashthrough is a software services company built around the shift from large, slow engineering teams ("ships") to small, AI-augmented squads ("planes"). We pair AI-generated architecture and code with senior human engineers who refine quality, edge cases, and user experience.

## How we work

- **Define** — scope the product in a focused session with a clear outcome and timeline.
- **AI builds** — AI-augmented team generates architecture, code, and components at machine speed.
- **Humans refine** — senior engineers and product thinkers shape quality and UX.
- **Ship** — live product with real users in weeks, not quarters.

## What we build

- AI products: LLM-powered apps, copilots, agents, intelligent workflows
- Internal tools: ops dashboards, admin systems, automation interfaces
- Automation systems: end-to-end pipelines replacing manual processes
- Full-stack apps: consumer and B2B products from zero to production

## Model

- Team size: 3 to 5 people per engagement
- Delivery cycle: 2 to 8 weeks
- Iteration speed: days per change
- AI leverage: core to every stage

## Links

- [Homepage](https://flashthrough.ai/)
